formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Slope of a line",
    "formula": "m = (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1)",
    "variables": "m: slope of the line; (x1, y1): a point on the line; (x2, y2): another point on the line",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Point-slope form of a line",
    "formula": "y - y1 = m(x - x1)",
    "variables": "m: slope of the line; (x1, y1): a point on the line; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find the equation of a line when the slope and a point are known"
  },
  {
    "name": "Two-point form of a line",
    "formula": "y - y1 = (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1)(x - x1)",
    "variables": "m: slope of the line; (x1, y1): a point on the line; (x2, y2): another point on the line; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find the equation of a line when two points are known"
  },
  {
    "name": "Slope-intercept form of a line",
    "formula": "y = mx + c",
    "variables": "m: slope of the line; c: y-intercept of the line; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find the equation of a line when the slope and y-intercept are known"
  },
  {
    "name": "y-intercept form of a line",
    "formula": "x = A cos θ + B sin θ",
    "variables": "A, B: coefficients; θ: angle",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find the equation of a line when the y-intercept and angle are known"
  },
  {
    "name": "Distance of a point from a line",
    "formula": "d = |(mx1 + ny1 - c)| / sqrt(m^2 + n^2)",
    "variables": "d: distance; m, n: coefficients of the line (in the form mx + ny = c); (x1, y1): point; c: constant term",
    "units": "m: metres",
    "notes": "Use to find the distance of a point from a line in the form mx + ny = c"
  },
  {
    "name": "Angle between two lines",
    "formula": "tan(θ) = |(m1 - m2)| / (1 + m1m2)",
    "variables": "θ: angle; m1, m2: slopes of the lines",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find the angle between two lines"
  },
  {
    "name": "Equation of the line passing through the point (x1, y1) and having slope m",
    "formula": "y - y1 = m(x - x1)",
    "variables": "m: slope; (x1, y1): point; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Equation of the line passing through the points (x1, y1) and (x2, y2)",
    "formula": "y - y1 = (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1)(x - x1)",
    "variables": "m: slope; (x1, y1): point; (x2, y2): another point; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Equation of the line having slope m and y-intercept c",
    "formula": "y = mx + c",
    "variables": "m: slope; c: y-intercept; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Equation of the line having slope m and passing through the point (x1, y1)",
    "formula": "y - y1 = m(x - x1)",
    "variables": "m: slope; (x1, y1): point; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Equation of the line having slope m and passing through the points (x1, y1) and (x2, y2)",
    "formula": "y - y1 = (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1)(x - x1)",
    "variables": "m: slope; (x1, y1): point; (x2, y2): another point; x, y: variable coordinates",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Collinear points",
    "formula": "The points (x1, y1), (x2, y2), and (x3, y3) are collinear if (y2 - y1)(x3 - x2) = (y3 - y2)(x2 - x1)",
    "variables": "(x1, y1), (x2, y2), (x3, y3): points",
